data.content:
1. Docs cleanup is incomplete: docs/audit/workflow-operations-map.md still documents prompt-guidance/checkPromptGuidance at lines 207, 443, and 538, and docs/audit/beats-usage-inventory.md still references checkPromptGuidance/PROMPT.md at lines 221 and 388.
2. Runtime packaging still ships prompt template assets: scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh line 78 copies PROMPT.md into the runtime bundle.
3. Tests still expect prompt-guidance behavior: src/lib/__tests__/prompt-cli.test.ts lines 42-80 exercises the prompt CLI and asserts FOOLERY_GUIDANCE_PROMPT_START insertion/removal.
4. Sanity gates are not all green: bun run lint failed in this checkout with 622 errors and 10620 warnings (including generated files under .claude/worktrees/agent-ab52a67d/.next/...); bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build passed.
